comment: Flow_CaseResolve — MERGE BY REGISTRATION (M1, LIVE 2026-06-20). Standalone returnable CHILD (Request-triggered, Response-equipped) called by CS Intake after Run_parse with a single { caseId }. Implements the operator's instructions<->images auto-merge: an instructions case (carries a Case/PO) and an images case (no Case/PO, identified by registration) that share the SAME non-empty VRM are merged into ONE case (the instructions case, the survivor) which then re-runs status-evaluate and lands in Review when otherwise complete (the human is the safety net). RULES: (a) exactly ONE complementary open same-VRM match -> MERGE; (b) MORE THAN ONE complementary match -> do NOT auto-merge, set the trigger case to duplicate_risk(100000005) -> Held for staff (ADR-0010: one reg can carry two legitimate claims); (c) ZERO -> no-op. INVIOLABLE GUARDS: only fires on a non-empty VRM; never merges a case that is already linked (caselinkstate Linked=100000002), inactive (statecode!=0), or terminal; idempotent (a re-fire finds the now-linked image case excluded and no-ops); failure-isolated (each branch's audit is best-effort). COMPLEMENTARITY DISCRIMINATOR: instructions cases have a non-empty cr1bd_casepo, image-only cases do not (CS Intake assigns Case/PO only when a provider/principal is known; image-only cases get none) — so 'has Case/PO' classifies a candidate as instructions vs images without an N+1 per-row evidence read. SURVIVOR = the case WITH a Case/PO. Evidence on the image case is re-pointed to the survivor via item/cr1bd_Caseid@odata.bind = cr1bd_cases(<survivorId>) (verified nav property, same form classify-persist uses). The image case is retired: status linked_to_instruction(100000006) + DEACTIVATED (statecode=1) — reversible, retained, leaves the active queues. NOTE: there is NO case->case lookup column in the schema (cr1bd_imagesourceid is a lookup to the cr1bd_imagesource MASTER table, NOT a case) — the merge provenance (which image case was absorbed) is recorded in cr1bd_caselinkstate=Linked + the cr1bd_duplicatekeys Memo, NOT in cr1bd_imagesourceid. This REPLACES the orphaned ADR-0010 dedup-ladder body (drop/attach/new/propose-attach/create keyed on candidateVrm/candidateRef/workProviderId); that ladder's attach/create rungs were never in intake's hot path (intake owns its own Create), and its '>1 candidate -> Held' rule survives here as rule (b). [LIVE].

manual.comment: Invoked by CS Intake (Run-a-Child-Flow) after Run_parse, non-blocking, with the newly-created/parsed case id. Single input { caseId }.

Init_merged.comment: Set true only when a single-pair auto-merge actually completes. Returned to the caller.

Init_outcome.comment: One of: noop | merged | held_multiple | skipped_guard. Returned to the caller for observability.

Init_survivorCaseId.comment: The instructions case (the one carrying a Case/PO) that survives the merge; status-evaluate re-runs on it.

Init_triggerIsInstructions.comment: Declared at top level (Logic Apps requires InitializeVariable to be top-level, never nested). Set inside Guard_mergeable.

Init_triggerIsImages.comment: Declared at top level (InitializeVariable cannot be nested). Set inside Guard_mergeable.

Get_trigger_case.comment: Read the trigger case: registration (cr1bd_vrm), Case/PO presence (instructions vs images discriminator), current link state / status / active state for the guard.

Guard_mergeable.comment: Fire only on a genuinely mergeable trigger case: non-empty VRM AND active (statecode=0) AND not already Linked(100000002) AND not terminal (eva_submitted/box_synced/error). Any failure -> skip (the else sets outcome=skipped_guard) so an already-merged / no-VRM / terminal arrival is a clean no-op (idempotent).

parameters.$filter: _cr1bd_caseid_value eq @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_kind eq 100000002 and statecode eq 0

List_trigger_instruction_evidence.comment: Active instruction-kind evidence (Instruction=100000002) on the trigger case. Used (with Case/PO presence) to decide whether the trigger is an instructions case.

parameters.$filter: _cr1bd_caseid_value eq @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_kind eq 100000000 and statecode eq 0

List_trigger_image_evidence.comment: Active image-kind evidence (Image=100000000) on the trigger case.

Set_triggerIsInstructions.comment: Trigger is an INSTRUCTIONS case if it carries a Case/PO OR holds active instruction evidence. (A Case/PO is only ever minted for a known provider/principal -> instructions.) SetVariable (the var is declared top-level).

Set_triggerIsImages.comment: Trigger is an IMAGES case if it is NOT instructions AND holds active image evidence. A case that is neither (e.g. nothing usable yet) leaves both false -> the complementary list is empty -> no-op. SetVariable (the var is declared top-level).

parameters.$filter: cr1bd_vrm eq '@{trim(coalesce(outputs('Get_trigger_case')?['body/cr1bd_vrm'], ''))}' and statecode eq 0 and cr1bd_caseid ne @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_status ne 100000006 and cr1bd_status ne 100000008 and cr1bd_status ne 100000009 and cr1bd_status ne 100000010

List_same_vrm_open_cases.comment: Other OPEN cases with the SAME registration, excluding the trigger and any already-retired (linked_to_instruction=100000006) or terminal case. caselinkstate Linked is filtered in-flow next (a possibly-null choice cannot be cleanly AND-ed in OData). This is the candidate pool; complementarity is applied by the Filter below.

Filter_complementary.comment: Keep only COMPLEMENTARY, not-already-linked candidates. Trigger is instructions -> keep image cases (empty Case/PO). Trigger is images -> keep instructions cases (non-empty Case/PO). Trigger is neither -> keep nothing (false). The single survivor is always the instructions case (the one carrying the Case/PO).

Switch_on_match_count.comment: ONE complementary match -> auto-merge. MANY -> Held (duplicate_risk) for staff. ZERO -> no-op.

Set_survivor_and_image.comment: Survivor = the instructions case (carries the Case/PO): the trigger if it is instructions, else the single complementary match. Image case = the other one.

List_image_case_evidence.comment: All ACTIVE evidence rows on the image case (every kind: images, .eml, etc.) — these get re-pointed to the survivor so the survivor holds the complete evidence set.

Update_evidence_case.comment: Re-point this evidence row's parent case to the survivor. nav property cr1bd_Caseid (verified) = cr1bd_cases(<survivorId>), no leading slash — identical form to classify-persist's evidence Caseid bind.

Repoint_evidence_to_survivor.comment: Sequential re-point (concurrency 1) so a partial failure is deterministic and re-runnable. Evidence migration is the load-bearing step; if it throws, the run fails and NOTHING below (retire/deactivate) executes, so the image case stays intact and the operator can re-fire.

Update_survivor_linkstate.comment: Mark the survivor Linked(100000002) and record the absorbed image case id in the cr1bd_duplicatekeys Memo (there is NO case->case lookup column; cr1bd_imagesourceid points to the cr1bd_imagesource MASTER table and must NOT take a case id). This is the reversible merge provenance.

Update_image_status.comment: Retire the image case: status linked_to_instruction(100000006), link state Linked(100000002). Set BEFORE deactivation (a deactivated row rejects field updates).

Deactivate_image_case.comment: Deactivate the image case (statecode=1 Inactive, statuscode=2 Inactive) so it leaves the active queues but is RETAINED and reversible. Reactivation restores it intact.

Run_status_evaluate_survivor.comment: Recompute the survivor's status now it holds the full evidence set: complete -> ready_for_eva (-> Review); else it stays Not Ready. CS Status Evaluate (4d963ff7...) — Request child, called by GUID. Non-blocking on its own outcome so a status hiccup never fails the merge itself.

parameters.item/cr1bd_after: @concat('merged image case ', outputs('Set_survivor_and_image')?['imageCaseId'], ' into instructions case ', variables('survivorCaseId'), ' on registration ', trim(coalesce(outputs('Get_trigger_case')?['body/cr1bd_vrm'], '')), '; evidence re-pointed; image case linked_to_instruction + deactivated')

Audit_merged.comment: Audit the merge (action Case Attached=100000004, Info). Linked to the survivor. runAfter status-evaluate on ALL outcomes so the audit always records even if status-evaluate hiccups; an audit hiccup is itself non-fatal (nothing runs after it in this branch).

Hold_trigger_duplicate_risk.comment: MORE THAN ONE complementary open match for this registration -> NEVER auto-merge (one reg can carry two legitimate claims, ADR-0010). Set the trigger case to duplicate_risk(100000005) so it lands in Held for a person to reconcile.

parameters.item/cr1bd_after: @concat('registration ', trim(coalesce(outputs('Get_trigger_case')?['body/cr1bd_vrm'], '')), ' has ', string(length(body('Filter_complementary'))), ' complementary open cases -> not auto-merged; case ', variables('caseId'), ' set to duplicate_risk for staff to reconcile')

Audit_held_multiple.comment: Audit the Held decision (action Duplicate Flagged=100000006, Warning). Linked to the trigger case.

Set_outcome_noop.comment: ZERO complementary matches -> no-op (nothing to merge; the case proceeds on its own through the normal status machine).

Set_outcome_skipped.comment: Trigger case is not mergeable (no VRM / inactive / already Linked / terminal) -> clean no-op. This is the idempotency path: a re-fire on an already-merged case lands here.

Respond_result.comment: Child-flow return (required to be callable via Run-a-Child-Flow). { caseId (trigger), merged (bool), outcome (noop|merged|held_multiple|skipped_guard), survivorCaseId }. runAfter Guard_mergeable on ALL completion outcomes so the child always returns even if a sub-step failed.
